text.title: One Task → One Branch → One Worktree → One Agent (Runtime-Isolated) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the task-worktree-runtime-isolation methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: plan-allocations
step.action: Reserve `n` slots: ports [4000+100i .. 4099+100i], DB `app_wt_<i>`, cache `wt<i>:`, vault path `…/wt-<i>`.

step.name: spawn-worktree
step.action: `git worktree add <path> <branch>`; inject env via templates/wt-env.example.
step.output: Worktree on disk with env file.

step.name: emit-manifest
step.action: Write the file manifest (explicit paths) into the worktree as `.faion/scope.txt`.

step.name: boot-isolated-runtime
step.action: Start the service with the per-worktree port/DB/cache/secrets; run smoke tests.
step.output: Service reachable on allocated port only.
step.decision-gate: If smoke fails, FREE the slot and abort the agent run.

step.name: merge-and-recycle
step.action: After merge, `git worktree remove`, drop DB namespace, free port range, revoke secrets bundle.
